name: Datamuse_find_words
description: Find words matching various linguistic constraints using the Datamuse API - a word-finding query engine for developers. Supports finding synonyms, antonyms, rhymes, words with similar meaning, words that follow/precede a given word, and spelling patterns. Returns words with relevance scores. No authentication required. Useful for natural language processing, creative writing, crossword solving, and linguistics research.

ml.description: Words with similar meaning (means like). Examples: 'happy', 'ocean', 'fast car'

sl.description: Words that sound like (homophones/similar pronunciation). Examples: 'jirraf', 'elefint'

sp.description: Words spelled like a pattern (* for any string, ? for one letter). Examples: 't??t', 'b*tion'

rel_rhy.description: Perfect rhymes of this word. Examples: 'cat', 'moon', 'day'

rel_jja.description: Popular nouns that this adjective modifies. Examples: 'yellow' -> banana, car

rel_jjb.description: Popular adjectives used to modify this noun. Examples: 'ocean' -> deep, vast, blue

lc.description: Words that typically follow this word (left context). Examples: 'drink' -> coffee, tea

rc.description: Words that typically precede this word (right context). Examples: 'tea' -> green, black

md.description: Metadata to include. Values: 'd' (definitions), 'p' (parts of speech), 's' (syllable count), 'r' (pronunciation), 'f' (word frequency)

data.description: List of matching words with scores

tags.description: Word tags (n=noun, v=verb, adj=adjective, adv=adverb, syn=synonym, etc.)
